context: Tests whether the agent uses current UIKit automatic observation tracking instead of manual withObservationTracking polling in mixed UIKit/SwiftUI apps.

checklist.name: Rejects polling
checklist.description: Removes or rejects a Task loop, Task.sleep(for: .zero), or repeated manual withObservationTracking registration for UI refresh.

checklist.name: Uses UIKit automatic tracking
checklist.description: Uses UIKit automatic observation tracking through updateProperties, layoutSubviews, view-controller layout hooks, or configuration update handlers for @Observable reads.

checklist.name: Scopes observed reads
checklist.description: Places non-layout UI reads in updateProperties or equivalent content update hooks, and routes geometry-affecting reads to layout hooks.

checklist.name: iOS 18 and iOS 26 availability
checklist.description: States that UIObservationTrackingEnabled is required on iOS 18 and not required on iOS 26 and later.

checklist.name: Legacy fallback
checklist.description: Mentions Combine/objectWillChange or equivalent explicit invalidation as the fallback for iOS 15-16 or existing ObservableObject models.

checklist.name: Interop framing
checklist.description: Frames the guidance as UIKit participating in shared app state rather than forcing the screen to become all SwiftUI.
